title: Obligor may not choose part of one item
doc_html:
Art. 1811.  Obligor may not choose part of one item

An obligor may not perform an alternative obligation by rendering as performance a part of one item and a part of another.

Acts 1984, No. 331, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.
